about.title: About the Founder
about.subtitle: Tech-driven manifestation practitioner
about.description: I'm Wang Haisheng, a full-stack developer and practitioner of the Manifest369 method. By combining technology with spiritual growth, I created this app to help people achieve their dreams.

list.name: John Smith
list.content: After using Manifest369 for three months, I successfully secured the investment opportunity I desired. This app made my manifestation practice more systematic.

list.name: Sarah Johnson
list.content: Daily 369 practice helped me focus more on my goals, with significant improvements in both work and life.

list.name: Mike Chen
list.content: Simple interface, powerful reminder features - helped me maintain 100 days of manifestation practice!

shareData.title: Manifest 369 - Scientific Manifestation
shareData.text: Discover Tesla's 369 secret and manifest your dreams scientifically!

step1.title: Where do you want the universe to meet you today?
step1.subtitle: Pick the area closest to your heart right now

step2.title: Pick an affirmation, or write your own
step2.subtitle: It will guide you through the next 3 entries
step2.placeholder: e.g. I deserve a life full of love and abundance…

step4.title: You just completed your first practice ✨
step4.subtitle: This is only the start. Sign up to save progress, unlock all 18 daily entries, and track your streak and mood.

career: I am attracting ideal opportunities to share my unique gifts.
My work is seen, appreciated, and richly rewarded.
Each day I grow into the person I am becoming.
wealth: Money flows to me easily, lightly, and with grace.
I deserve a life of abundance, safety, and freedom.
The universe meets me with unexpected gifts.
relationship: I am deeply loved, and I am learning to love myself deeply.
Warm, healthy, mutually nourishing relationships are near.
I let myself be seen, and I let love arrive easily.
health: My body is full of energy and lighter every day.
I care for myself gently; my body is my home.
Calm and clarity are my natural state.
